createImageGeneration.desc_en: Generate images from a text prompt via the OpenAI-compatible images endpoint. On AIsa this path routes to the ByteDance Seedream family only; Wan 2.7 image models go through `/v1/chat/completions` and Gemini image previews through `/v1/models/{model}:generateContent`. Mind the upstream minimum-pixel requirement on the requested size, or the request is rejected.
createImageGeneration.description_zh: 通过 OpenAI 兼容的图像接口,从文本提示词生成图像。在 AIsa 上,该路径仅路由到 ByteDance Seedream 系列;Wan 2.7 图像模型走 `/v1/chat/completions`,Gemini 图像预览走 `/v1/models/{model}:generateContent`。注意上游对请求尺寸有最小像素要求,否则请求会被拒绝。
createImageGeneration.resp_section_intro: 成功时返回生成的图像列表及本次调用的用量统计。
createImageGeneration.errors_source: spec 已声明 400/401/404/429/500/502(仅 description,无错误体结构)

errors.message_zh: 请求无效,最常见是 `size` 像素数低于下限,返回「image size must be at least 3686400 pixels」。
AIsa API Key 缺失或无效。
该模型未路由到本接口;Wan 2.7 系列会在此返回 `openai_error`,应改用 `/v1/chat/completions`。
上游模型供应商不可达。

model.desc_en: Which image model to run. On this endpoint it pins the call to the Seedream family; Wan 2.7 models must instead be called through `/v1/chat/completions`.
model.title_zh: 本次调用使用的图像模型。在本接口上它将调用锁定到 Seedream 系列;Wan 2.7 模型须改走 `/v1/chat/completions`。

prompt.desc_en: Natural-language description of the image you want. It is the main driver of the result — be specific about subject, style, and lighting for better output.
prompt.title_zh: 你想要的图像的自然语言描述。它是结果的主要驱动信号 —— 对主体、风格、光照描述得越具体,产出越好。

n.desc_en: How many images to generate in one call. Each generated image is billed separately at the per-image rate, so a higher count multiplies cost.
n.title_zh: 单次调用生成的图像数量。每张图按单图费率分别计费,数量越多成本成倍增加。

size.desc_en: Output dimensions in `WIDTHxHEIGHT` form. Seedream's upstream enforces a minimum of 3,686,400 pixels (`width × height`), so e.g. `1024x1024` is rejected while `1920x1920` and larger pass; any aspect ratio is fine as long as the pixel total clears the floor.
size.title_zh: 输出尺寸,形如 `WIDTHxHEIGHT`。Seedream 上游要求像素总数(`宽 × 高`)不低于 3,686,400,因此 `1024x1024` 会被拒,`1920x1920` 及更大可通过;只要像素总数过线,任意宽高比都可以。

model.desc_en: The model that actually produced these images, echoing the requested model.
model.title_zh: 实际生成这些图像的模型,回显请求中指定的模型。

created.desc_en: When the images were generated, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
created.title_zh: 图像生成的时间,Unix 时间戳(秒)。

data.desc_en: The generated images, one entry per image — its count matches the requested `n`.
data.title_zh: 生成的图像,每张一个条目 —— 数量与请求的 `n` 一致。

data.url.desc_en: Short-lived URL to a generated image. It expires, so download and persist the image promptly rather than relying on the link long-term.
data.url.title_zh: 指向某张生成图的临时 URL。该链接会过期,应尽快下载并持久化图像,不要长期依赖此链接。

data.size.desc_en: The actual dimensions of the returned image, which may differ from the requested size after upstream adjustment.
data.size.title_zh: 返回图像的实际尺寸,经上游调整后可能与请求尺寸不同。

usage.desc_en: Resource-usage breakdown for this call, used for billing and quota tracking.
usage.title_zh: 本次调用的资源用量明细,用于计费与配额核算。

usage.generated_images.desc_en: Number of images actually generated and billed in this call.
usage.generated_images.title_zh: 本次实际生成并计费的图像数量。

usage.output_tokens.desc_en: Tokens attributed to producing the output for this call, used in cost calculation.
usage.output_tokens.title_zh: 本次产出所计的输出 token 数,参与成本计算。

usage.total_tokens.desc_en: Total tokens charged for this call.
usage.total_tokens.title_zh: 本次调用计费的总 token 数。
